name: Pomona College
meets_full_need_notes: Pomona meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students. One of the most generous aid programs among liberal arts colleges.
no_loan_notes: Pomona has a no-loan policy for all domestic students who qualify for financial aid. Loans are replaced entirely with grants. No income cap on this policy.
ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive the same need-based financial aid as RD applicants. Pomona guarantees full need will be met regardless of admission round.
appeal_policy: Students may appeal their financial aid package by contacting the Financial Aid Office with documentation of extenuating circumstances or competing offers from peer institutions.
